mapper.insert: insert into project(com_id, pro_name, pro_desc, emp_id, pro_status, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at ) values(#{com_id}, #{pro_name}, #{pro_desc}, #{emp_id}, #{pro_status}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, CURDATE(), CURDATE())
mapper.select: select p.* , e.emp_name from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id where p.pro_status = #{pro_status} order by p.pro_id desc
select p.* , e.emp_name from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id where p.pro_id = #{pro_id}
select p.*, e.emp_name from project p join employee e on p.emp_id = e.emp_id order by p.pro_id desc limit #{start},#{end}
mapper.update: update project set pro_name = #{pro_name}, pro_desc = #{pro_desc}, pro_status = #{pro_status}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date}, updated_at = CURDATE() where pro_id = #{pro_id}
